register.title: Register for the trip
register.alreadyRegisteredBody: Hi {{name}}, this device is already registered.
register.phonePlaceholder: Enter the phone number you registered with
register.recoveryNoMatch: No registration found with this phone number
register.recoverySelectYou: Found a match — select your name
register.recoveryQrHint: Scan the QR code you received when you first registered
register.recoveryQrNotFound: No registration matches this QR code

itinerary.title: Itinerary
itinerary.usingCache: Showing data saved on this device (offline)

myQr.title: My QR
myQr.noSession: We couldn't find your registration. Please register first.

myRoom.title: My Room
myRoom.noRoom: Your room hasn't been assigned yet.

bagLookup.title: This bag belongs to
bagLookup.notFound: We couldn't find this bag tag
bagLookup.unassigned: This bag hasn't been assigned to an owner yet

bingo.title: Bingo
bingo.noGame: No bingo game running right now.
bingo.tapHint: Tap a called number to mark it.
bingo.editModeHint: Tap a cell to edit its number, or tap "Shuffle" — then tap "Confirm card" when ready (you can't edit after confirming).
bingo.editHint: Tap a number on your card to change it.
bingo.editErrorDuplicate: This number is already on your card

shareLocation.title: Share location
shareLocation.consent: I consent to share my location during the trip
shareLocation.noActiveSession: No active request for your location right now.
shareLocation.notSupported: This device doesn't support location sharing.
shareLocation.permissionDenied: Couldn't access your location. Please allow location access.
shareLocation.hint: Check the box to start sharing your location with the guide.

home.subtitle: Pick a menu below to see your trip details
home.qrSubtitle: Show to check in / claim luggage

sos.title: Emergency SOS
sos.noSession: We couldn't find your registration. Please register first.
sos.holdInstruction: Press and hold for 2 seconds to send an SOS signal
sos.sentBody: SOS sent. Staff have received your location. Please wait.
sos.queuedBody: You're offline — this will send automatically once back online. Meanwhile, call the guide directly from the list below 👇
sos.pendingSync: {{count}} signal(s) waiting to sync (will send automatically once online)
sos.notePlaceholder: e.g. In front of the 7-Eleven across from the temple
sos.offlineNotice: Offline — showing the last numbers saved on this device

tripGuide.title: Trip Guide
tripGuide.noArticles: No articles in this category yet
tripGuide.offlineNotice: Offline — showing the last data saved on this device

feedback.title: Trip feedback
feedback.subtitle: Rate and share your thoughts about this trip
feedback.notRegistered: Please register first before you can submit feedback
feedback.saved: Saved — you can keep editing until feedback closes

mySeat.title: My Seat
mySeat.notRegistered: Please register first to view your seat
mySeat.noSeatYet: You haven't been assigned a seat yet
mySeat.usingCache: Showing data saved on this device (offline)

staffManager.title: Manage staff
staffManager.subtitle: Add or remove team members who can log in with a PIN
staffManager.cannotDeleteSelf: You can't delete your own account
staffManager.showToGuestHint: Enabled numbers appear on the guest SOS page (guide/staff category)

guestManager.title: Manage guests
guestManager.subtitle: {{count}} guests registered — view their registration details
guestManager.searchPlaceholder: Search name, phone, or other info
guestManager.confirmDelete: Delete "{{name}}"'s registration? This can't be undone.

luggageManager.title: Manage luggage
luggageManager.genHint: Generate blank tags ahead of time, then print them as QR stickers before attaching to bags
luggageManager.scanTagHint: Scan the QR code on a bag that hasn't been assigned yet
luggageManager.tagNotFound: This tag wasn't found in the system
luggageManager.noUnassigned: No unassigned tags left. Try generating more.
luggageManager.scanToLoadHint: Scan each bag's QR as it's loaded — status updates automatically
luggageManager.loadUnassigned: Tag {{code}} hasn't been assigned yet — assign it first
luggageManager.confirmDeleteTag: Delete tag {{code}}? This can't be undone.

printExport.title: Print & Export
printExport.subtitle: Print QR labels for luggage tags or guest wristbands
printExport.sizeLockHint: The size is locked via @page when you actually print — print one test label before printing the whole batch to confirm it matches your real labels.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.sosOpen: {{count}} SOS still open · tap to view

checkIn.title: Check-in
checkIn.usingCache: Showing the last data saved on this device
checkIn.pendingSync: {{count}} check-ins waiting to sync (will send automatically once back online)
checkIn.scanHint: Point the camera at the guest's QR code
checkIn.scanNotFound: This QR code doesn't match anyone on this trip
checkIn.scanCameraError: Couldn't open the camera. Please allow camera access.
checkIn.eventOfflineNotice: This check-in round needs an internet connection — offline mode isn't supported.
checkIn.eventTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Getting off the bus at the Grand Palace

seatMap.title: Bus seat map
seatMap.confirmDeleteBus: Delete bus "{{name}}"? All seats on this bus will be removed too.
seatMap.noBus: No buses yet. Tap "Add bus" to get started.
seatMap.disableSeat: Disable this spot (not a seat, e.g. restroom)
seatMap.blockedHint: This spot is disabled (not a passenger seat).
seatMap.resizeHint: Changing rows/seats auto-adds or removes seats (existing seats and assignments are kept)

roomMap.title: Room map
roomMap.confirmDeleteHotel: Delete hotel "{{name}}"? All rooms at this hotel will be removed too.
roomMap.noHotel: No hotels yet. Tap "Add hotel" to get started.
roomMap.generalInfoPlaceholder: e.g. where to eat, facilities, wifi password
roomMap.noRooms: No rooms yet. Tap "Create rooms" to get started.
roomMap.noRoomsMatch: No rooms match the current filters

locationMonitor.title: Location monitor
locationMonitor.noSession: You haven't started requesting guest locations yet.
locationMonitor.sessionLabelPlaceholder: e.g. On the way to the temple
locationMonitor.confirmStop: Stop requesting locations? Guests will stop sharing immediately.

bingoHost.title: Bingo host
bingoHost.noGame: No bingo room started yet. Tap "Add room" to get started.
bingoHost.manualErrorDuplicate: This number has already been called

formBuilder.title: Registration form builder
formBuilder.subtitle: Add, remove, edit, or reorder questions on the guest registration form / feedback form
formBuilder.optionsHelp: Options (one per line — add * at the end of a line to add a follow-up text box when that option is chosen, e.g. "Other, please specify*")

itineraryBuilder.title: Itinerary builder
itineraryBuilder.subtitle: Add, edit, reorder, and update item status during the trip

dietarySummary.title: Dietary / medical summary
dietarySummary.subtitle: Totals to send to restaurants and hotels

expenseTracker.title: Expense tracker
expenseTracker.subtitle: Quickly log on-the-ground expenses, with a running total for the trip
expenseTracker.queuedNotice: Offline — saved on this device, will sync automatically once back online

supplierManager.title: Supplier manager
supplierManager.subtitle: Central directory of hotels/restaurants/transport/attractions/shops — reusable across trips
supplierManager.name: Name
supplierManager.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Rooms are a bit old but food is great, price is negotiable
supplierManager.confirmDelete: Delete supplier "{{name}}"? Its usage on other trips will be removed too.
supplierManager.noSuppliers: No suppliers in the directory yet

feedbackSummary.title: Feedback summary
feedbackSummary.subtitle: Average ratings and comments from guests — set up questions in Form Builder's Feedback mode
feedbackSummary.noFields: No feedback questions yet — set them up in Form Builder's Feedback mode first

sosMonitor.title: Emergency SOS
sosMonitor.noContacts: No contacts in this category yet
sosMonitor.guideNumbersHint: Pulled automatically from the Staff table — toggle "Shown to guests" on the Manage Staff page

guideBuilder.title: Trip guide builder
guideBuilder.subtitle: Articles + phrasebook — everything lives in the database and publishes to guests instantly
guideBuilder.noArticles: No articles in this category yet
guideBuilder.formatUnderlineHint: Note: standard Markdown doesn't support underline, so only bold, italic, and bullet list are available.
guideBuilder.noPhrases: No phrases in this category yet
guideBuilder.importInstructions: Paste one entry per line, columns separated by tab or comma, in order: category, phrase, translation, pronunciation (optional) — paste directly from Excel/Google Sheets.
